title: fix(deps): update module github.com/containernetworking/cni to v1.3.0
body:

|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| [github.com/containernetworking/cni](https://redirect.github.com/containernetworking/cni) | `v1.2.3` -> `v1.3.0` | [![age](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/age/go/github.com%2fcontainernetworking%2fcni/v1.3.0?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) | [![adoption](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/adoption/go/github.com%2fcontainernetworking%2fcni/v1.3.0?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) | [![passing](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/compatibility/go/github.com%2fcontainernetworking%2fcni/v1.2.3/v1.3.0?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) | [![confidence](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/confidence/go/github.com%2fcontainernetworking%2fcni/v1.2.3/v1.3.0?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) |

---

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>containernetworking/cni (github.com/containernetworking/cni)</summary>

### [`v1.3.0`](https://redirect.github.com/containernetworking/cni/releases/tag/v1.3.0)

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/containernetworking/cni/compare/v1.2.3...v1.3.0)

#### What's Changed

-   RFC - Support safe subdirectory-based plugin conf loading by [@​bleggett](https://redirect.github.com/bleggett) in [https://github.com/containernetworking/cni/pull/1052](https://redirect.github.com/containernetworking/cni/pull/1052)

This adds a new config flag `loadPluginsFromFolde`r - if present, for a given named network bar, plugin configuration objects will be loaded from `<path-to-bar-network-config-file>/bar/xxx.conf`. This may be useful for vendors providing chained plugins: you can add your plugin to a chain without needing to edit the file in-place.

#### New Contributors

-   [@​bleggett](https://redirect.github.com/bleggett) made their first contribution in [https://github.com/containernetworking/cni/pull/1052](https://redirect.github.com/containernetworking/cni/pull/1052)

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/containernetworking/cni/compare/v1.2.3...v1.3.0

</details>

---
